channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loop Rd - failed surfacing, 5th April
item.description:
10 - 20m either side of pin, wearing course failed, down to sub base in a large number of areas.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Loop Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Used furniture near to Bin area and the entrance of creasy estate (1-7), 5th April
item.description:
Disturbs resident and blocked the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aberdour Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chislehurst Rd - open feeder pillar, 5th April
item.description:
Chislehurst Rd j/w Crofton La, as per pin on map, large feeder pillar - door completely off, wires exposed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped outside 19 Adolphus Road, 5th April
item.description:
Fridge dumped outside 19 Adolphus Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Adolphus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over 20 cars parked on curb blocking street, 5th April
item.description:
There is something going on in Kempe hall and the people are parking on pavement and on peoples drives and on there grass outside their houses

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charnwood Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked over pavement, 5th April
item.description:
This car is always parked half in a drive and 90% across the public pavement. This has continued to stop people from using the pavement which causes us to have to walk into the road unnecessarily. This is very dangerous especially when we are trying to get our children to school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynford Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wilful obstruction of the highway with cones (Linked to Beechbrook site activity), 5th April
item.description:
There is a wilful obstruction of the highway on Lubbock Road. Two private 'No Parking' cones have been placed on the public carriageway. While positioned on the opposite side of the road and slightly downstream from the main entrance of Beechbrook (BR7 5JL), they appear to be placed by the site's responsible party to manage traffic or parking. This follows a pattern of highway obstructions related to this development, including previous issues with barriers (Ref: 9212605 and Ref: 9208929). The deliberate placement of these cones restricts public parking and creates a hazard on this narrow stretch, especially given the proximity to marked-out potholes. Please investigate this breach of the Highways Act 1980 and ensure the party at Beechbrook is instructed to remove them. Evidence Attached: LBB022-A, B, C: Photos clearly showing the "No Parking" cones and their relation to the road width.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags adorned to multiple lamp posts, 5th April
item.description:
The union Flag has been attached to multiple lamp posts in this location. As I understand it this is illegal if not carried out by the council. It appears to have been done as part of the national campaign to make immigrants feel unwelcome. They have been there many months and require removal. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in layby, in corner, 5th April
item.description:
Fly tipping in layby, in corner. Has been here for a couple of weeks now. Recurring location
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light facing wrong way, 5th April
item.description:
This traffic light seems to twist and turn every other week something needs to be done!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norman Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Rubbish dumped on side entrance to church hall car park., 5th April
item.description:
Two months ago came across rubbish dumped which prevented access to car park causing great deal of inconvenience. Having returned today for an Easter service have come to find the rubbish is still there. Speaking to some parishioners this has been reported but nothing has been done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): All Saints Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 803, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black felt tip pen graffiti. Same hand writing which has been on other racist graffiti since last year, in the area., 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti one racist the other accusing a member of the local community of being a paedophile.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
